sources.title: Decoding of the neural representation of the visual RGB color model
sources.authors: Wu, Y., Mao, Y., Feng, K., Wei, D., & Song, L.
sources.affiliation: Fudan University, Shanghai; Shanghai Key Research Laboratory
sources.finding: Up to 93.7% decoding accuracy for R/G/B from EEG. Sequential peak latencies: R at 190 ms, G at 215 ms, B at 238.5 ms post-stimulus.

sources.title: Beagle model analysis of fluid dynamics in canine olfactory epithelium for enhanced gas sensing
sources.authors: Komatsu, K., Yonezawa, T., & Yamamoto, K.
sources.affiliation: Nagaoka University of Technology; University of Tokyo
sources.finding: 3D X-ray CT and CFD analysis of canine nasal cavity. Inhaled air splits into two functionally distinct streams: a respiratory route and an olfactory route through the ethmoturbinates. Approximately 12-13% of inhaled air diverts into the olfactory stream.

sources.title: Wild hummingbirds discriminate nonspectral colors
sources.authors: Stoddard, M. C., Eyster, H. N., Hogan, B. G., Morris, D. H., Soucy, E. R., & Inouye, D. W.
sources.affiliation: Princeton University; Rocky Mountain Biological Laboratory; Harvard University; University of British Columbia; University of Maryland
sources.journal: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences
sources.finding: Field experiments with wild hummingbirds confirmed discrimination of nonspectral colors (UV+red, UV+green, UV+yellow, purple) invisible to trichromats. Avian color space is a tetrahedron versus the human trichromatic triangle.

sources.title: A Cost-Efficient RGB Laser-Based Visible Light Communication System by Incorporating Hybrid Wavelength and Polarization Division Multiplexing Schemes
sources.finding: 60 Gbps aggregate (6 channels x 10 Gbps) over 500 m fiber using three RGB laser diodes (650 nm, 530 nm, 450 nm) combined with polarization division multiplexing. Three orthogonal wavelengths + two polarization states yield six independent channels.

sources.title: VRGB: Visual RGB Colorspace as Semantic Coordinate System
sources.finding: 16.7M hex positions as semantic vectors. Euclidean distance as conceptual relatedness. Compression steering via coordinate geometry.
